name: Familiar-Possessed - Aussa
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>着</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アウス
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Aussa the Earth Charmer" and 1 face-up EARTH monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Aussa the Earth Charmer" and 1 face-up EARTH monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Aussa the Earth Charmer" and 1 face-up EARTH monster you control to the GY. If this card Special Summoned by its effect attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Deck
